creator: nacho319+freebsdZilla@gmail.com
text:
I didn't do svndiff (sorry missed that detail) I did create a diff/patch using diff -rupN to create the patch file.  I can create the svndiff file if you still want/need it.

Hopefully I'll get the netmap driver added into the code base as well.  But that will come out with a release update to YAF, not as a FreeBSD patch.
